name: codex-lens
description: 一款关于Codex历史会话查看的放大镜应用。

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5173 dist-electron/electron/main.js && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron dist-electron/electron/main.js
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.pack:mac: npm run build:icon:mac && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dir
scripts.dist:mac:zip: npm run build:icon:mac && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac zip
scripts.dist:mac:dmg: npm run build:icon:mac && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:icon:mac && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg zip
